title: rubus × cavaticaulis
intro: Rubus × cavaticaulis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a hybrid species of the raspberry plant, resulting from the cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus × cavaticaulis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of Rubus × cavaticaulis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
